violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026
